content.description:
A multi-pane hierarchical browser for navigating the Hobson item system by structure. Inspired by Smalltalk's System Browser, it lets users drill down through organizational axes (Types, Tags, Views, Libraries) to discover what exists in the system.

## Architecture

- **Type**: `system-browser` — instances are placed in the viewport like any item
- **View**: [system-browser-view](item://c61afb35-cd78-4122-a9ff-7e28b884c74e) — renders the three-pane browser UI
- **Data**: [related-items-lib](item://f5f8535c-8db9-4bff-a810-28174b77235c) provides all index queries (`getInstancesOf`, `getSubtypesOf`, `getViewsFor`, `getAllTags`, `getAllTypes`)

## UI Layout

Tab bar (Types | Tags | Views | Libraries) above three columns:
- **Column 1**: Categories for the selected axis (e.g. all type definitions)
- **Column 2**: Items within the selected category (e.g. instances of a type)
- **Detail Panel**: Metadata and summary for the selected item, with an Open button

Click navigates within the browser; double-click opens the item in the viewport.

## See Also

- [Architecture Overview](item://a0a0a0a0-d0c0-4000-8000-000000000003)
- [Core Concepts](item://a0a0a0a0-d0c0-4000-8000-000000000002)
- [Future Directions](item://c0c0c0c0-0042-0000-0000-000000000000)
